businessQuestion: Which promotions experienced stockouts during campaign periods?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DPROM.PROMOTION_NAME,
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    COUNT(*) AS STOCKOUT_CASES,
    SUM(FPP.PROMO_SALES_AMT) AS PROMO_SALES
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_PROMOTION_PERFORMANCE FPP
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PROMOTION DPROM
ON FPP.PROMOTION_KEY=DPROM.PROMOTION_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FPP.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE FPP.STOCKED_OUT_DURING_PROMO=1
GROUP BY
    DPROM.PROMOTION_NAME,
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME
ORDER BY STOCKOUT_CASES DESC;
businessContext: Marketing and Supply Chain want to ensure promotions are adequately stocked.
